files.patch:
@@ -23,14 +23,14 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: ${{ matrix.node }}
-          cache: pnpm
 
       - name: Enable Corepack
-        run: corepack enable
+        run: |
+          corepack enable
+          corepack prepare pnpm@10.25.0 --activate
 
       - name: Install
         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Check
         run: pnpm check
-
